basic_details.job_title: IMSc Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate, System Trainee and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate, Project Assistant, Administrative Trainee, System Trainee
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Mathematical Sciences (IMSc) has released the official Project Associate, Project Assistant, Administrative Trainee, System Trainee Recruitment 2026 on 27 April 2026 at www.imsc.res.in. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced under the IMSc Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged under 40 years with qualifications ranging from Bachelor’s degree to Master’s degree, B.Tech, B.Sc., or MS-Office proficiency can apply via email from 27 April 2026 to 10 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application instructions are available below.

age_limit.details: The Candidates should be less than 40 years of age as on the last date of receipt of applications.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree, Master’s degree, B.Tech / B.E., B.Sc. (Physics/Maths/CS/IT), BCA, CSIR/UGC-NET / GATE / JAM / JEST qualified, MS-Office proficiency
qualification.details: Project Associate – I: Bachelor’s / Master’s in Natural Sciences / B.Tech from a recognized university. Must have cleared one of: CSIR/UGC-NET, GATE, JAM, JEST (scorecard required). Project Assistant (ICMR project): Master’s in Physics/Biology/Mathematics/Chemistry or B.Tech/M.Tech from a reputed institute. Project Assistant (Phytochemical project): Master’s in Life Sciences / Bioinformatics / Environmental Sciences / Computational Biology + relevant research experience. Administrative Trainee: Any Bachelor’s degree (First Class) + good English. Passed out only in 2023, 2024 or 2025. Good knowledge of MS-Office, email & accounting procedure. System Trainee: B.Sc. (Physics/Maths/CS/IT) or BCA or B.E./B.Tech (CS/ECE/EEE/IT) with ≥60%. Passed out only in 2023, 2024 or 2025.

salary_details.details: Project Associate – I: Rs. 32,500/- (Bachelor without exp) to Rs. 48,000/- (Bachelor + ≥2 yrs exp or MSc/BE/BTech without exp) per month consolidated. Project Assistant (ICMR project): Rs. 48,000/- (<2 yrs exp) / Rs. 54,500/- (>2 yrs exp) per month consolidated. Project Assistant (Phytochemical project): Rs. 48,000/- (<2 yrs exp) / Rs. 54,500/- (>2 yrs exp) per month consolidated. Administrative Trainee: Rs. 20,000/- per month consolidated. System Trainee: Rs. 20,000/- per month consolidated.

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test Typing Test Hands-on Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IMSc Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IMSc recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IMSc recruitment is 10th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IMSc recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various posts including Project Associate, Project Assistant, Administrative Trainee, and System Trainee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IMSc jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the IMSc posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 54,500/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, but generally include Bachelor's or Master's degrees in relevant fields, with some posts requiring specific entrance exam qualifications like NET, GATE, JAM, or JEST.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for IMSc recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting, followed by a written test, typing test, hands-on test, and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Institute of Mathematical Sciences located?
faq.answer: The Institute of Mathematical Sciences (IMSc) is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
